words.hint: This pullstring cowboy is Andy's favourite toy
A space ranger who believes he is a real hero
A yodelling cowgirl with a red hat and braid
A loyal dog toy with a springy metal body
Woody's trusty horse — loyal and fast
A strawberry-scented bear who runs Sunnyside Daycare

A wisecracking piggy bank who holds the change
An anxious green dinosaur who worries about his small arms
A penguin squeaky toy with a broken squeak
The daycare centre that turns out to be a toy prison
The name written on the bottom of Woody's boot
The restaurant Woody and Buzz escape to in the first film
Buzz's surname — also a unit of astronomical distance
Stinky Pete's toy title — the villain of Toy Story 2
